memberdef.name: arma_applier_1
memberdef.initializer: {\ uword i,j;\ \ for(i=0, j=1; j<n_elem; i+=2, j+=2)\ {\ eT tmp_i = P[i];\ eT tmp_j = P[j];\ \ tmp_i = eop_core<eop_type>::process(tmp_i, k);\ tmp_j = eop_core<eop_type>::process(tmp_j, k);\ \ out_mem[i] operatorA tmp_i;\ out_mem[j] operatorA tmp_j;\ }\ \ if(i < n_elem)\ {\ out_mem[i] operatorA eop_core<eop_type>::process(P[i], k);\ }\ }

memberdef.name: arma_applier_2
memberdef.initializer: {\ uword count = 0;\ \ for(uword col=0; col<n_cols; ++col)\ {\ uword i,j;\ \ for(i=0, j=1; j<n_rows; i+=2, j+=2, count+=2)\ {\ eT tmp_i = P.at(i,col);\ eT tmp_j = P.at(j,col);\ \ tmp_i = eop_core<eop_type>::process(tmp_i, k);\ tmp_j = eop_core<eop_type>::process(tmp_j, k);\ \ out_mem[count ] operatorA tmp_i;\ out_mem[count+1] operatorA tmp_j;\ }\ \ if(i < n_rows)\ {\ out_mem[count] operatorA eop_core<eop_type>::process(P.at(i,col), k);\ ++count;\ }\ }\ }

memberdef.name: arma_applier_3
memberdef.initializer: {\ uword count = 0;\ \ for(uword slice=0; slice<n_slices; ++slice)\ {\ for(uword col=0; col<n_cols; ++col)\ {\ uword i,j;\ \ for(i=0, j=1; j<n_rows; i+=2, j+=2, count+=2)\ {\ eT tmp_i = P.at(i,col,slice);\ eT tmp_j = P.at(j,col,slice);\ \ tmp_i = eop_core<eop_type>::process(tmp_i, k);\ tmp_j = eop_core<eop_type>::process(tmp_j, k);\ \ out_mem[count ] operatorA tmp_i;\ out_mem[count+1] operatorA tmp_j;\ }\ \ if(i < n_rows)\ {\ out_mem[count] operatorA eop_core<eop_type>::process(P.at(i,col,slice), k);\ ++count;\ }\ }\ }\ }
